description: Useful mobile applications for productivity, health, and everyday life.

products.name: Fitness Tracker App
products.description: Track workouts, steps, calories, and sleep with personalized fitness insights.

products.name: Note Taking App
products.description: Beautiful note-taking app with markdown, folders, tags, and cloud sync.

products.name: Habit Builder
products.description: Build and track daily habits with streaks, reminders, and progress statistics.

products.name: Meditation App
products.description: Guided meditation sessions with ambient sounds, timers, and progress tracking.

products.name: Expense Tracker
products.description: Track expenses, manage budgets, and visualize spending with smart categories.

products.name: Recipe App
products.description: Discover and save recipes with meal planning, grocery lists, and nutritional info.

products.name: Weather App
products.description: Hyper-local weather forecasts with radar maps, alerts, and customizable widgets.
